handler.comment: GT Sector-Change Rerouting: Check destination reachability on sector change (for all GT ship activities)

debug_text.text:
'[GT-MoveGeneric] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': EPOCH ROUTE MISMATCH:' + '
 Epoch old/new: ' + $cachedEpoch + ' -> ' + $currentBlacklistEpoch + '
 Cached sectors (' + $cachedRemainingSectors.count + '): ' + $cachedPathText + '
 New sectors (' + $recalculatedRemainingSectors.count + '): ' + $newPathText

set_value.name: $blacklistGroupDisplay
set_value.exact: if $threatAvoidanceEnabled and $useDynamicBlacklist then $blacklistgroup else 'N/A (threat avoidance disabled)'

debug_text.text: '[GT-MoveGeneric] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SECTOR CHANGE CHECK: dest=' + $destinationDisplayName + ' (sector ' + @$destinationSector.knownname + '), normal=' + $normalDistance + ', blacklist=' + $blacklistDistance + ', group=' + $blacklistGroupDisplay + ', threatAvoidance=' + $threatAvoidanceEnabled + ', useBlacklist=' + $useDynamicBlacklist + ', epoch=' + $currentBlacklistEpoch + ', epochChanged=' + $epochChanged + ', routeChangedByEpoch=' + $routeChangedByEpoch

set_value.name: $statusText
set_value.exact: if $blacklistDistance lt 0 then 'No safe path available' else 'Path requires detour'

debug_text.text: '[GT-MoveGeneric] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SECTOR CHANGE REROUTE: Destination ' + @$currentDestination.knownname + ' changed (normal: ' + $normalDistance + ' jumps, blacklist-aware: ' + $blacklistDistance + ' jumps, epochRouteChanged: ' + $routeChangedByEpoch + ') - aborting movement'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Message = $logbookMessage, $Category = 'alerts', $Title = 'Route Path Changed: ' + this.ship.knownname, $Object = this.ship, $Ship = this.ship, $Interaction = 'showonmap', $Highlighted = false, $CheckGlobalSettings = false, $RespectPerShipLogbook = true ]

handler.comment: GT Enemy Departure Detection: Remove tracked enemies when they leave sectors

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Tracked enemy ship ' + $shipName + ' left sector ' + $leftSectorName + ' and moved to ' + $newSectorName

handler.comment: GT Enemy Destruction Detection: Remove tracked enemies when destroyed
GT ThreatAvoidance: re-evaluate sector when player combat ship arrives
GT ThreatAvoidance: hostile gravidar contact detection (move.generic)

set_value.name: $_broadcasted
set_value.exact: if ($pilotLevel ge 6 and $_broadcastAllowed and $threatLevel ge $threshold and $hostileCount gt 0) then 'YES' else 'NO'

set_value.name: $_broadcastReason
set_value.exact: if $hostileCount == 0 then 'NO COMBAT HOSTILES (requires purpose.fight)' else if $pilotLevel lt 6 then 'PILOT LEVEL TOO LOW (Lv.' + $pilotLevel + ', requires Lv.6+)' else if not $_broadcastAllowed then 'THROTTLED' else if $threatLevel lt $threshold then 'THREAT BELOW THRESHOLD' else 'OK'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat-Detect] ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (Pilot Lv.' + $pilotLevel + ') in ' + this.sector.knownname + ' - hostiles=' + $hostileCount + ' (XL=' + $shipClass_XL + ', L=' + $shipClass_L + ', M=' + $shipClass_M + ', S=' + $shipClass_S + ')' + ', threatScore=' + $threatScore + ', threatLevel=' + $threatLevel + ', threshold=' + $threshold + ', primaryFaction=' + $_primaryFactionName + ', broadcasted=' + $_broadcasted + ' (' + $_broadcastReason + ')'

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}.$RouteIllegalAbort
set_value.exact: table[ $Reason = 'route_illegal_pre_transit', $NextSector = $nextsector, $NextSectorName = if $nextsector? then @$nextsector.knownname else 'Unknown', $Ware = $gtPrecheckWare, $WareName = if $gtPrecheckWare? then @$gtPrecheckWare.name else 'Unknown', $ActiveWare = if $gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware? then $gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware else null, $ActiveWareName = if $gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware? then @$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware.name else 'none', $PoliceFaction = $nextsector.policefaction, $PoliceFactionName = if $nextsector.policefaction? then @$nextsector.policefaction.knownname else 'Unknown', $PoliceFactionId = if $nextsector.policefaction? and $nextsector.policefaction.id? then $nextsector.policefaction.id else 'none', $Timestamp = player.age ]

do_if.value: global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}.{$gtCacheOwner}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}.{$gtCacheOwner}.{$gtCacheBlacklist}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}.{$gtCacheOwner}.{$gtCacheBlacklist}.{$gtCacheStart}?

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}.$RouteIllegalAbort
set_value.exact: table[ $Reason = 'route_illegal_pre_transit', $NextSector = $gtRouteNextSector, $NextSectorName = if $gtRouteNextSector? then @$gtRouteNextSector.knownname else 'Unknown', $Ware = $gtPrecheckWare, $WareName = if $gtPrecheckWare? then @$gtPrecheckWare.name else 'Unknown', $ActiveWare = if $gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware? then $gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware else null, $ActiveWareName = if $gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware? then @$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware.name else 'none', $PoliceFaction = $gtRouteNextSector.policefaction, $PoliceFactionName = if $gtRouteNextSector.policefaction? then @$gtRouteNextSector.policefaction.knownname else 'Unknown', $PoliceFactionId = if $gtRouteNextSector.policefaction? and $gtRouteNextSector.policefaction.id? then $gtRouteNextSector.policefaction.id else 'none', $Timestamp = player.age ]

do_if.value: global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}.{$gtCacheOwner}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}.{$gtCacheOwner}.{$gtCacheBlacklist}? and global.$GT_RouteLegalityCache.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$HomeSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$BuySector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$SellSector}.{$gtPrecheckPolicy.$Ware}.{true}.{true}.{$gtCacheOwner}.{$gtCacheBlacklist}.{$gtCacheStart}?
